message:
🐛 Fix GA4 engaged sessions crash and add update lifecycle tracking (#2114)

* 🐛 Fix GA4 engaged sessions crash and add update lifecycle tracking

Move initAnalytics() before React render to fix race condition where
engagementStartMs was 0 when PageViewTracker fired, dropping all
engagement time and crashing engaged sessions from 82% to 1.6%.

Add update lifecycle GA4 events: ksc_update_completed (with duration),
ksc_update_failed, ksc_update_stalled, and ksc_update_refreshed to
track whether the update mechanism is working end-to-end.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix mission completion tracking and add GA4 blind spot coverage

- Fix mission completion never firing (agent sends 'result', not 'stream done:true')
- Add marketplace install failure tracking with error details
- Add theme change tracking (settings + toggle sources)
- Add language change tracking
- Add AI mode/predictions/confidence/consensus tracking
- 7 new GA4 events close visibility gaps identified in analytics audit

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add GA4 tracking for all blind spot features

High priority:
- Drill-down open/close with view type and depth
- Card manual refresh button clicks
- Global cluster/severity/status filter changes
- Prediction feedback (thumbs up/down)
- Snooze/unsnooze for cards, alerts, missions, recommendations

Medium priority:
- Dashboard create/delete/rename/import/export
- YAML download and copy-to-clipboard
- User management role changes and deletions

Lower priority:
- Sidebar navigation clicks with destination
- 18 new GA4 events covering all previously untracked features

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix max call stack recursion and .includes() on undefined bugs

- Add re-entrancy guard to startGlobalErrorTracking() in analytics.ts
  to prevent infinite recursion when emitError() → send() triggers
  another error caught by the same global handler (27 user-reported events)
- Guard pod status in kubectlProxy.ts: `reason || phase || 'Unknown'`
  to prevent undefined status propagation (7 user-reported events)
- Add null check in PodIssues.tsx getIssueIcon() for undefined status

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add GA4 tracking to all 22 arcade games

Track game_started and game_ended events with game name, outcome
(win/loss), and score for all arcade games. This answers "do people
play the arcade games?" — 30 users (7.4%) visit /arcade but we had
zero visibility into which games they play or how long.

Games tracked: 2048, snake, tetris, pong, node_invaders, match,
sudoku, solitaire, checkers, chess, flappy_pod, kube_craft,
kube_doom, kubedle, pod_brothers, pod_crosser, pod_pitfall,
pod_sweeper, kube_galaga, kube_kart, kube_man, kube_kong

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Fix Checkers taunt layout shift and add framework-level card analytics

- Move pirate taunt from document flow to absolute overlay on the board,
  preventing the checker board from shifting down/up when taunts appear
- Add pre-game taunt that fires 2 seconds after the card opens
- Add emitCardPaginationUsed and emitCardListItemClicked analytics
- Wire pagination tracking into CardPaginationFooter
- Wire list item click tracking into CardListItem

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add cluster inventory analytics with GA4 user property

Emits ksc_cluster_inventory event when cluster count changes, tracking
only aggregate counts (total, healthy, unhealthy, unreachable) and
distribution type counts (eks, gke, openshift, etc.) — never names,
IPs, or identifiers. Sets cluster_count as a GA4 user property so
averages can be computed across the user base.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Fix GA4 geolocation for proxied requests (European traffic)

Send GA4 params as POST body instead of URL query string. The /g/collect
endpoint ignores _uip (IP override) in query params when the request
originates from a server IP, causing all proxied traffic to geolocate to
the proxy's IP (US) instead of the user's real location. Sending params
as POST body makes GA4 respect _uip for correct geolocation.

Fixes both the Netlify Function proxy and the Go backend proxy.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add temporary debug-ip endpoint for geolocation testing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Inject Netlify geo data as GA4 custom dimensions

GA4 ignores _uip from AWS Lambda IPs (where Netlify Functions run),
causing all proxied traffic to geolocate to the Lambda region. Netlify
provides pre-computed geolocation via x-nf-geo header — inject this as
custom event parameters (geo_country, geo_city, geo_region,
geo_country_code) so geographic data appears in GA4 Explore reports
regardless of GA4's IP-based geolocation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Remove temporary debug-ip endpoint before merge

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ import { CardComponentProps } from './cardRegistry'

+import { emitGameStarted, emitGameEnded } from '../../lib/analytics'
 
 // Game constants
 const CANVAS_WIDTH = 280
@@ -320,6 +321,7 @@ export function PodCrosser(_props: CardComponentProps) {
               if (l <= 1) {
                 setGameOver(true)
                 setIsPlaying(false)
+                setScore(s => { emitGameEnded('pod_crosser', 'loss', s); return s })
                 return 0
               }
               return l - 1
@@ -558,6 +560,7 @@ export function PodCrosser(_props: CardComponentProps) {
     setGameOver(false)
     setWon(false)
     setIsPlaying(true)
+    emitGameStarted('pod_crosser')
   }, [initGame])
 
   const scale = isExpanded ? 1.4 : 1

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ import { getContributorLevel } from '../../types/rewards'
 import { useVersionCheck } from '../../hooks/useVersionCheck'

-import { emitLinkedInShare } from '../../lib/analytics'
+import { emitLinkedInShare, emitLanguageChanged } from '../../lib/analytics'

 import { DeveloperSetupDialog } from '../setup/DeveloperSetupDialog'
@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ export function UserProfileDropdown({ user, onLogout, onPreferences }: UserProfi
 
   const handleLanguageChange = (langCode: string) => {
     i18n.changeLanguage(langCode)
+    emitLanguageChanged(langCode)
     setShowLanguageSubmenu(false)
   }

@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
 import type { PredictionFeedback, StoredFeedback, PredictionType, PredictionStats } from '../types/predictions'

@@ -109,6 +110,7 @@ export function usePredictionFeedback() {
     feedbackMap.set(predictionId, entry)
     notifySubscribers()
     persistFeedback()
+    emitPredictionFeedbackSubmitted(feedback, predictionType, provider)
 
     // Also send to backend if available
     sendFeedbackToBackend(predictionId, feedback).catch(() => {

@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
 import { POLL_INTERVAL_SLOW_MS } from '../lib/constants/network'
+import { emitSnoozed, emitUnsnoozed } from '../lib/analytics'
 
 const STORAGE_KEY = 'kubestellar-snoozed-alerts'
 
@@ -99,6 +100,7 @@ export function useSnoozedAlerts() {
     state.snoozed = [...state.snoozed, newSnoozed]
     saveState()
     notifyListeners()
+    emitSnoozed('alert', duration)
     return newSnoozed
   }, [])
 
@@ -126,6 +128,7 @@ export function useSnoozedAlerts() {
     state.snoozed = state.snoozed.filter(s => s.alertId !== alertId)
     saveState()
     notifyListeners()
+    emitUnsnoozed('alert')
   }, [])
 
   const isSnoozed = useCallback((alertId: string): boolean => {

@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
 import { MissionSuggestion } from './useMissionSuggestions'
+import { emitSnoozed, emitUnsnoozed } from '../lib/analytics'
 
 const STORAGE_KEY = 'kubestellar-snoozed-missions'
 const SNOOZE_DURATION_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 // 24 hours
@@ -81,6 +82,7 @@ export function useSnoozedMissions() {
     state.snoozed = [...state.snoozed, newSnoozed]
     saveState()
     notifyListeners()
+    emitSnoozed('mission')
     return newSnoozed
   }, [])
 
@@ -89,6 +91,7 @@ export function useSnoozedMissions() {
     state.snoozed = state.snoozed.filter((s) => s.id !== id)
     saveState()
     notifyListeners()
+    emitUnsnoozed('mission')
     return mission
   }, [])

@@ -605,7 +605,7 @@ class KubectlProxy {
           name: pod.metadata.name,
           namespace: pod.metadata.namespace,
           cluster: context,
-          status: reason || phase,
+          status: reason || phase || 'Unknown',
           reason,
           issues: problems,
           restarts,

@@ -118,14 +118,18 @@ enableMocking()
     // in parallel with the main bundle, reducing time-to-first-paint.
     await import('./lib/unified/registerHooks')
 
+    // Initialize GA4 analytics BEFORE first render so engagement tracking
+    // starts before PageViewTracker fires. The old setTimeout(() => ..., 0)
+    // deferred init to the next tick, causing engagementStartMs to be 0 when
+    // the first page_view flushed engagement — dropping all engagement time
+    // and crashing engaged sessions from 82% to 1.6%.
+    initAnalytics()
+
     ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
       <React.StrictMode>
         <BrowserRouter>
           <App />
         </BrowserRouter>
       </React.StrictMode>,
     )
-
-    // Initialize GA4 analytics after first render (deferred)
-    setTimeout(() => initAnalytics(), 0)
   })
